# match(_:)

**Instance Method**

Match the specified string value against a string or an array of strings.

## Declaration

```swift
func match(_ value: String) -> EntitlementsQuery
```

## Discussion

Strings are matched byte for byte (i.e. no unicode normalization occurs).
title: match(_:)
